programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Jonah and Sandra represent the employees at union contract negotiations with corporate; Amy, Dina and Cheyenne distract themselves by looking for the perfect Christmas tree; Mateo, Garrett and Glenn compete to see who can sell an unsellable item.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: After Cloud 9's acquisition, Amy struggles to contact the store's new parent company; Sandra enlists Garrett and Dina's help to stand up to Carol; Glenn wrestles with a big career decision; Jonah takes up the cause of gender equality.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Just as Sam and Jay are set to host a friend's wedding that could get their bed-and-breakfast business off the ground, the ghost of Hetty's husband tries to ruin it.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sasappis offers to help Sam complete the bed and breakfast website so they can start taking reservations; Pete bonds with Jay over basketball, until Jay makes a new living friend; Flower attempts to be Pete's new basketball buddy.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When Sam and Jay have the ghosts bunk together to free up rooms for guests at the bed-and-breakfast, they learn that Thorfinn has been having night terrors, which inspires Sam to enlist a therapist to help him.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: The secret about Trevor's missing pants is finally revealed when his wealthy former friend comes to Woodstone Mansion to buy the timepiece Sam and Jay found on Elias Woodstone's corpse; Thor decides to tell Flower how he feels about her.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Olympia and the team take on a client who is fighting to gain full control of an AI afterlife software company she developed with her late sister; Olympia tries to repair her relationship with Sarah; Matty gets a troubling call from Joey.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Alcaras struggles to balance work and home life and must make a difficult choice when he's tempted by an offer that goes against his morals; the police struggle to connect the mystery marathon man with Carrie and Milo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: On Michael's first day as Chief of Internal Medicine, Joan arrives at the hospital as a patient in dire straits; Amy clashes repeatedly with Richard over Joan's treatment plan; Gina makes a nearly impossible medical decision for a young patient.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: Mindy plans a Christmas party in order to spend more time with Cliff; Brendan's date steals Mindy's thunder when she performs a sexy dance.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.sub-title: Danny Castellano Is My Personal Trainer
programme.desc: Mindy convinces Danny to help her get into shape before a weekend away with Cliff; Peter acts as managing partner when Jeremy is out sick.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun's proposed treatment for a homeless patient puts him and Jared in Andrews' crosshairs; Claire tries to overcome Melendez's reluctance to do a risky heart operation; Glassman must face a difficult decision about his health.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun pushes back against Dr. Melendez in order to treat a gravely ill hospital janitor; Dr. Lim risks a lawsuit and her career to help a teenage girl repair the damage caused by an archaic custom.

programme.title: Sand Dollar Cove
programme.desc: A real estate developer travels to a quaint seaside town to convince a charming local to sell his beachfront property. As she tries to figure out a way to make the deal work, the undeniable attraction between them continues to grow.

programme.title: All Summer Long
programme.desc: Tia's dream job of captaining a dining cruise hits rough water when her ex is hired as the restaurant's chef.

programme.title: To Her, With Love
programme.desc: Kayla heads back to her North Carolina hometown after her substitute teaching job at a private high school comes to an early end. Her mother sets up a job interview at her alma mater, where she and another teacher try to save the art department.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Way Home
programme.sub-title: If You Could Read My Mind
programme.desc: The three Landry women finally get answers to questions about the past, present and future; but a discovery will propel them to search for more.

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Theo shares a secret with Marlena; Paulina vents to Belle; Gwen and Xander share a playful morning; EJ and Kristen clash; Alex surprises Stephanie, but it does not go well.

programme.title: Mom
programme.sub-title: A Dark Closet and Therapy With Horses
programme.desc: Bonnie reluctantly consults a therapist for help with her attention deficit disorder; Christy battles her urge to gamble on sports while helping out at the bar.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mom
programme.sub-title: Soup Town and a Little Blonde Mongoose
programme.desc: When Christy gets sick, Bonnie is consumed with an overwhelming urge to mother her.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: The employees wrestle with the loss of beloved co-worker Myrtle -- and the fact that she left a large sum of money to Jonah; Cheyenne recruits Mateo in a possible pyramid scheme; Dina reconnects with a surprise visitor in the store: her father.

programme.desc: Amy tries to make Mateo her new assistant, leading to accusations of favoritism and a group competition in the store; Sandra gets caught in a power struggle between Glenn and Dina; Jonah attempts to show Garrett that he's still one of the guys.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin and Marty are surprised when their new business sparks protests from residents concerned about gentrification; Grover's family tree project reveals fresh details about the whereabouts of Dave's estranged father.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave's estranged father, Lamar, arrives in town eager to reconnect; his son finally learns the truth about his disappearance 30 years prior; Marty struggles to fire an underperforming employee.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Calvin pushes Marty to move up the opening of their new business to get a valuable celebrity endorsement from D.L. Hughley; Dave continues to struggle with the return of his father; Tina and Gemma prepare for the opening of their new school play.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Gemma and Dave are adjusting to Grover growing up and becoming a teenager; Marty and Calvin are struggling with different management styles at work; one of Marty's new employees, Courtney, might become something more.

programme.title: Tulips in Spring
programme.desc: When a young interior designer learns her father has broken his leg, she rushes home to rural Washington because her help is desperately needed at the family tulip farm.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
